svg.title: Django request lifecycle with success and error paths
svg.desc: A vertical pipeline showing a Django request moving down through the WSGI handler, middleware, URL resolver, authentication, permission check, view logic, and back out through response middleware. At each stage an arrow branches right to the error response that stage can produce: 302 or 403 from middleware, 404 from the URL resolver, 401 from authentication, 403 from the permission check, and 500 from an unhandled exception in the view.
